patch.value: Align pm-codex with native ChatGPT/Codex plugin and Apps SDK contracts

Harden the shipped pm-codex bundle as a self-contained, version-coherent native Codex plugin, make supported plugin components and install behavior accurate, and define the separate Apps SDK architecture required for ChatGPT web and public plugin distribution.

Cached marketplace installs load a self-contained MCP runtime whose version matches the installed plugin without an npx-at-latest startup dependency; only documented plugin components are shipped or claimed; manifest, marketplace, assets, legal metadata, skills, and MCP configuration validate against the then-current official OpenAI contract; cache-layout and fresh-session smokes prove skills and MCP tools load; the ChatGPT lane is resolved by an explicit architecture decision and, if selected, a reachable MCP app with exact tool schemas, output schemas, safety annotations, authentication/privacy controls, developer-mode proof, submission tests, and documented surface support; implementation starts only after explicit approval.
A trustworthy plugin whose native Codex behavior, ChatGPT reach, runtime packaging, permissions, and public distribution claims match the official OpenAI contracts.

Official plugin and Apps SDK documentation changed materially in 2026, while the cached pm-codex runtime still falls back to npx at latest and the public docs conflate a local Codex bundle with a ChatGPT app.
pm-codex has an evidence-backed local Codex implementation and an explicit, independently validated path for any ChatGPT app or public plugin scope.

value.author: codex-native-plugin-research
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence 2026-07-11: pm context, list-open, list-in-progress, and all-status searches for native codex plugin, pm-codex Apps SDK, ChatGPT Codex plugin official docs, Codex plugin npx fallback cache, and native ChatGPT plugin found the closed shipped lineage pm-0c9q/pm-d97r plus Claude-only pm-l9wl/pm-dudr, but no item covering current OpenAI plugin and Apps SDK alignment. This feature extends rather than reopens the completed May implementation.

author: maintainer-agent
message: Agent-distribution program owns Codex surface pinning; pm-codex alignment executes on that surface

author: maintainer-agent
message: Sibling agent-platform plugin work: Claude plugin install/versioning learnings apply to pm-codex
